scenarios.title: Password Login Shows Stream
scenarios.description: App auto-triggers login, authenticates with password, verifies StreamViewController is shown with access token.

scenarios.title: Session Restore After Terminate
scenarios.description: Logs in, terminates app, relaunches without reset — verifies session persists.

scenarios.title: Logout Returns to Login
scenarios.description: Authenticated on stream page, taps logout, verifies LoginViewController is shown.

scenarios.title: Token Refresh Keeps Session
scenarios.description: Logs in with short-lived token, waits for expiry, verifies token refreshes and session continues.

scenarios.title: Cold Launch Initializes
scenarios.description: Fresh launch verifies app reaches either login or stream page without crashing.

scenarios.title: Multiple Launch Cycles Stability
scenarios.description: Logs in, then terminates and relaunches twice — verifies session survives multiple cycles.

scenarios.title: Logout clears session on relaunch
scenarios.description: Logs in, logs out, terminates, relaunches without reset, and verifies the login page appears (keychain cleared by logout).

scenarios.title: Relaunch with connection drops recovers session
scenarios.description: Logs in, terminates, queues connection drops on refresh endpoints, relaunches, and verifies the session recovers.

scenarios.title: Expired access token refreshes on relaunch
scenarios.description: Logs in with a short access TTL, terminates after access expires, relaunches, and verifies the token is refreshed.
